name: podman-mcp
description: MCP server for managing Podman containers under WSL

list_containers.description: List all Podman containers (running and stopped)

start_container.description: Start a Podman container by name or ID

stop_container.description: Stop a running Podman container by name or ID

restart_container.description: Restart a Podman container by name or ID

logs_container.description: Get logs from a Podman container

podman_status.description: Check the status of the Podman rootless socket and daemon

healthcheck.description: Full health check: Podman socket, running containers, and key service ports
